prompt: How do I create a spring-damper force between two parts in Adams CMD? The spring should have stiffness 5000 N/mm and damping 100 N·s/mm, with a free length of 250 mm.
assertions: Uses force create element_like spring_damper (not single_component_force, bushing, or beam)
The stiffness parameter is set to 5000
The damping parameter is set to 100
The length parameter (free length) is set to 250
Explains or implies that spring_damper acts along the line joining the two markers
